positive: A stylish, minimalist celestial adventure scene. Depict a stylized, laughing astronaut floating through a nebula sky. The astronaut is rendered in a clean, bold silhouette with retro-futuristic elements (e.g., bubble helmet, stylized boots). The background features swirling, vibrant nebula colors (deep indigo, magenta, teal, gold dust) contrasted sharply against black space. Include subtle, crystalline constellations and stylized geometric celestial bodies (rings, moons) adding depth. The overall composition should be centered, highly contrastive, and suitable for a single, impactful repeating or centered print on apparel. Vector art influence, graphic novel style, vibrant vaporwave color palette, clean lines, flat design elements, highly detailed.
negative: blurry, watermark, logo, text, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, mutated, low detail, grain, noise, low contrast, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, photorealism
